name: std-dashboard-grid-embedded
description: std-dashboard-grid-embedded — embeddable sibling of std-dashboard-grid-layout. Renders the same toolbar / filter / 12-tile grid contract WITHOUT wrapping it in dashboard-layout chrome (no sidebar, no appName, no nav). Use inside another app shell that already owns the surrounding chrome.

schema.name: std-dashboard-grid-embedded
schema.description: std-dashboard-grid-embedded — embeddable sibling of std-dashboard-grid-layout. Renders the same toolbar / filter / 12-tile grid contract WITHOUT wrapping it in dashboard-layout chrome (no sidebar, no appName, no nav). Use inside another app shell that already owns the surrounding chrome.

effects.className: min-h-[96px] h-full rounded-lg border border-dashed border-[var(--color-border)] bg-[var(--color-surface-subtle)] text-[var(--color-text-muted)]

filter4Trait.label: Filter slot 4
filter4Trait.description: Trait reference for the fourth filter-row position. Format '@trait.<TraitName>' picks any trait declared on the orbital (typical use: secondary dropdown filter); '@trait.EmptyTile' leaves the slot blank. Override THIS config to add, swap, remove, or reorder filter controls — never edit other traits.

tile9Trait.label: Tile slot 9
tile9Trait.description: Trait reference for grid cell 9. Format '@trait.<TraitName>' picks any trait declared on the orbital; '@trait.EmptyTile' leaves the cell blank. Override THIS config to swap a chart, remove a tile, or reorder — never edit any other trait to move tile content.

tile5Trait.label: Tile slot 5

tile7Trait.description: Trait reference for grid cell 7. Format '@trait.<TraitName>' picks any trait declared on the orbital; '@trait.EmptyTile' leaves the cell blank. Override THIS config to swap a chart, remove a tile, or reorder — never edit any other trait to move tile content.

toolbar2Trait.label: Toolbar slot 2
toolbar2Trait.description: Trait reference for the second top-right toolbar tile. Format '@trait.<TraitName>' picks any trait declared on the orbital (typical use: share action); '@trait.EmptyTile' leaves the slot blank. Override THIS config to swap, remove, or reorder toolbar tiles — never edit other traits.

minTileWidth.label: Tile min width
minTileWidth.description: Minimum pixel width per tile before the grid re-flows
